title: VACUUM corrupts database when MAIN and TEMP table names overlap.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE main_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR NOT NULL, value DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR NOT NULL, value INTEGER DEFAULT 1);
INSERT INTO temp_table (name, value) VALUES ('test2', NULL);
key_bug_features: MAIN and TEMP table names overlap during VACUUM
